canonical_keyword:
‍

‍

To integrate Wordpress with Twitter follow these steps: 

‍

  1. Head to your dashboard and click ""Settings"" in the sidebar.
  2. Click on ""Sharing"" to open your social media integration options. All your connection settings live here.
  3. Drag the Twitter icon into the ""Enabled Services"" area. This activates the Twitter sharing button on your posts.
  4. Customize how and where the Twitter button appears—choose what works best for your audience.
  5. Hit ""Save Changes"" and you're all set. Your WordPress posts can now be shared on Twitter with one click.
"

‍

  3. Check the summary in the dialog box for details on fonts

‍

You can easily toggle which version of Claude (Sonnet or Opus) your AI agent uses for code generation and chat.

‍

  1. Open the Cursor application on your computer.
  2. Click File on the toolbar and locate Preferences.
  3. Choose Cursor Settings from the dropdown menu.
  4. Click on the Models tab in the sidebar of the settings window.
  5. Locate Sonnet 4.6/Opus 4.6 and toggle the switch to On to enable the latest high-speed Claude model.
  6. Close the settings tab to save your changes.
"

You can cancel your Cursor Pro subscription from your account billing settings to stop future charges.

‍

  1. Sign in to your Cursor account.
  2. Select ""Billing & Invoices"" from the settings menu on the left sidebar.
  3. Click ""Manage in Stripe"" to open the billing portal.
  4. You will be redirected to the Stripe billing page where your subscription details are shown.
  5. Click ""Cancel Subscription"" to begin the cancellation process.
  6. Follow the confirmation prompts

Here’s how to move WordPress to a new domain: 

‍

  1. Head to your dashboard and click 'Domain' to kick off the migration process.
  2. Click 'Transfer Domain' to open your domain settings.
  3. Hit 'Get started' to begin setting up your domain transfer.
  4. Enter your new domain name and the authorization code from your current registrar. Think of it as your domain's passport.
  5. Click 'Transfer' to start the move. Your site will be live on the new domain in 5-7 days.
"

  5. Click ""Save Changes"" to confirm. You can now link your Twitter with Wordpress.

Here’s how to do it: 

‍

  1. Click on the post or page you want to revert to see its revision history.
  2. Choose the post and click 'Edit' to head to the editor where you made the changes. This is where WordPress keeps track of every edit you've made.
  3. Look for the Revisions panel in the sidebar. Click it to see all previous versions of your content.
  4. Browse through the timeline to find the version you want. The slider shows you what changed and when.
  5. Click ""Restore This Revision"" to bring it back. Your current version will be saved as a new revision.
  6. Hit ""Save"" to publish the reverted version. You can always repeat this process if you need to go back further.
"

Here’s a step-by-step tutorial on how to compare domain metrics in Semrush:

‍

  1. Head over to Domain Overview in the left sidebar.
  2. Enter the website URL of the domain metrics you want to check. Hit Search.
  3. You will get the Semrush Authority Score (DA score) and organic search traffic of the website.
  4. Click on the Compare Domains tab to enter the 2nd website you want to compare.
  5. Add the competitor's website URL.
  6. And hit Compare.
  7. You will get a side-by-side comparison of the website metrics of both domains.
"

  6. Head back to your Grid view.
  7. You can now add dates associated with the entries in the date column.
  8. Select the date from the calendar dropdown.
  9. You can now view your entries on your calendar!
